description:
fz_print_value (and future inspect) stays tagged-FzValue at its ABI — inherently polymorphic. After VR.3+VR.4 their typed callers must convert their arg into FzValue before the call.

Two flavors to decide between BEFORE landing:

  A. PESSIMISTIC: box-up at the call site, fz_print_value unboxes internally to pick a renderer.
     `print(n)` for `n: int` becomes shift-left-3 | tag-int | call fz_print_value.
     fz_print_value already handles all tags + heap kinds.
     ~100 LOC; keeps fz_print_value as the single entry point.

  B. OPTIMISTIC: JIT picks a typed print FFI based on ir_typer's Descr.
     `print(n)` for `n: int` becomes `call fz_print_i64(n)` — no boxing round trip.
     fz_print_value remains as the `any`-typed fallback.
     ~150 LOC; resurrects the .12-era fz_print_i64 / fz_print_f64 / fz_print_bool / fz_print_atom / fz_print_nil helpers in runtime/src/lib.rs (currently dead — see freebie cleanup).

Pessimistic is simpler. Optimistic is faster and dovetails with the freebie cleanup (those helpers either get resurrected here or get deleted in the cleanup ticket; can't be both).

Land flavor B unless there's a reason not to.

## Adds (flavor B)

  - lower_prim or builtin-call lowering picks fz_print_<kind> when arg Descr narrows; falls back to box-up + fz_print_value otherwise.
  - Restore + revive (don't just un-delete) the typed print FFI symbols in runtime/src/lib.rs — they had .12-era assumptions baked in; refresh to match the current FzValue rep.
  - Fixtures exercising each typed print path.

## Kills

  - The "always box up everything before print" assumption.
  - For flavor B specifically: blocks the freebie cleanup from deleting the typed print helpers. They live here instead.

## Acceptance

  - print(n) for n: int doesn't allocate (no fz_alloc_float or boxing for ints).
  - print(:ok) lowers to a single typed call (no boxing).
  - Polymorphic print sites (arg type any) still work via fz_print_value.
  - Matrix green; hello.fz expected output unchanged.
title: VR.5b: boundary box-up at print/inspect call sites
